key.mousewheelie.all_of_kind_modifier.am: Holding this modifier while scrolling will send all stacks of the same kind.
key.mousewheelie.deposit_modifier.amecsa: Holding this modifier while clicking will deposit the item to the open container.
Holding this modifier while clicking will drop the item.
key.mousewheelie.open_config_screen.amec: Opens the Mouse Wheelie config screen if pressed in-game or in the main menu.
key.mousewheelie.pick_tool.amecsapi.desc: Manually triggers that the correct tool for the currently faced block is selected.
key.mousewheelie.restock_modifier.amecsa: Holding this modifier while clicking will restock the item from the open container.
key.mousewheelie.sort_inventory.amecsapi: Sorts the inventory that the mouse is currently over.
key.mousewheelie.whole_stack_modifier.am: Holding this modifier while scrolling will send the whole stack.
mousewheelie.config.general.better-fast-:
This helps when you regularly move your mouse faster than the game can pick up.
This will impact performance though.
mousewheelie.config.general.enable-bundl: Enable clicking and dragging the bundle in the inventory to easily put in or out multiple stacks.
mousewheelie.config.general.enable-drop-:
Enables dropping items when holding the drop modifier (alt by default) and clicking on them.
The modifier can be changed in the vanilla controls menu.
mousewheelie.config.general.enable-quick: Enables quick swapping of armor pieces and elytra pieces by clicking them while in hand.
Enables right-clicking in recipe books/villager trading to swiftly craft/trade.
mousewheelie.config.general.hotbar-scopi:
Lets you define how the hotbar will be treated when e.g. scrolling or sorting items in the inventory.
  HARD: The hotbar will always be treated separately.
  SOFT: The hotbar will be treated as part of the inventory. This does not apply when sending the whole inventory (ctrl+shift).
  NONE: The hotbar will be treated as part of the inventory. This also applies when sending the whole inventory (ctrl+shift).
mousewheelie.config.general.integrated-i: Sets the interval in milliseconds for singleplayer and local multiplayer.
mousewheelie.config.general.interaction-:
Sets the interval in milliseconds in which interactions are sent to the server.
Lower numbers increase the speed but might be rejected by servers.
mousewheelie.config.general.item-kinds-n:
Whether item types should check nbt data.
This is for example used by scrolling and drop-clicking.
NONE disables this, ALL checks for exactly the same nbt and SOME allows for differences in damage and enchantments.
mousewheelie.config.general.pick-from-bu:
This extends the Vanilla "pick block" feature when pressing the middle mouse button to pick from bundles.
Picking from bundles will only be performed if the block is not directly in the inventory already.
mousewheelie.config.refill.always-keep-s: Always refills into the currently selected hotbar slot, even if free hotbar slots are available.
mousewheelie.config.refill.description:
Item refilling is a feature that automatically loads more items from your inventory when your current stack runs out.
This is for example useful when building with a lot of the same block, so you don't have to constantly open your inventory.

The first section of this config concerns which or under which circumstances items will get refilled.
The "Refill rules" section, allows you to configure how the replacement stack will be determined by searching your inventory.
mousewheelie.config.refill.drop.descript: Refill when dropping stacks from the hotbar.
mousewheelie.config.refill.eat.descripti: Refill when the last food item in the hand has been consumed.
mousewheelie.config.refill.enable.descri:
Enables item refilling.
Turn this off to disable refilling entirely.
Checks bundles in the inventory for items to refill with.
Bundles will be checked last.
Refill when the item just used changes to a different item.
This is e.g. triggered when filling or emptying water buckets.
mousewheelie.config.refill.off-hand.desc: Refills stacks in the off hand.
mousewheelie.config.refill.play-sound.de: Plays a sound after refilling a stack.
mousewheelie.config.refill.restore-selec:
Restore the refilled item to the originally selected slot.
This will take a tad more time. You might want to turn this off on slow connections.
mousewheelie.config.refill.rules.any-blo: Tries to find any other block items.
mousewheelie.config.refill.rules.block-h:
Try to find similar block items through the block type hierarchy.
This usually indicates a similar functionality.
mousewheelie.config.refill.rules.descrip: Configure with which new item the previous stack will be refilled.
mousewheelie.config.refill.rules.equal-i: Refill with the same item (no NBT)
Try to find equal items (no NBT matching).
mousewheelie.config.refill.rules.equal-s: Try to find equal stacks (NBT matching).
mousewheelie.config.refill.rules.food.de: Try to find any other food item.
mousewheelie.config.refill.rules.item-hi:
Try to find similar items through the item type hierarchy.
This usually indicates a similar functionality.
mousewheelie.config.refill.rules.itemgro: Find items that are in the same creative inventory tab.
mousewheelie.config.refill.use.descripti: Refill when using up items, like tools or weapons.
mousewheelie.config.scrolling.descriptio:
With this feature, scrolling while hovering over a stack lets you easily move single items in or out of your inventory.
In combination with modifiers such as Shift and Control (changeable in the Controls settings) you can scroll whole stacks, all of a kind of item or even all items in an inventory.
mousewheelie.config.scrolling.directiona:
If enabled, items will be moved based on the visual position on the screen:
When scrolling up, items will be sent to the upper inventory, when scrolling down to the lower inventory.
If disabled, scrolling will instead affect the amount of items:
When scrolling up, items will be moved towards the stack, when scrolling down items will be sent to the opposite inventory.

Using "Invert scroll direction", you can swap the up and down behavior for these actions.
mousewheelie.config.scrolling.invert.des: Invert the scroll direction when scrolling items.
mousewheelie.config.scrolling.prefer-sta:
With this enabled, items with special scrolling interactions, like bundles, will have their special behavior by default.
You can press the alt key and scroll to actually move the stack instead.
mousewheelie.config.scrolling.scroll-cre: Sets whether to by default scroll items out of the creative menu.
Sets whether creative mode tabs can be switched by scrolling over them.
mousewheelie.config.server-required: This feature only works in singleplayer or on a server with Mouse Wheelie installed.
mousewheelie.config.sort.control-sort.de: Sets the sort mode for sorting whilst pressing control.
mousewheelie.config.sort.description:
Change sort modes. Existing sort modes are ALPHABET, RAW_ID and QUANTITY.
For Minecraft 1.19 and up there's also CREATIVE_SEARCH.
mousewheelie.config.sort.optimize-creati:
Whether the creative search sorting should be optimized for performance.
This will make use of more memory in exchange for processor time, only disable this if you run into memory issues.
mousewheelie.config.sort.primary-sort.de: Sets the sort mode for normal sorting.
mousewheelie.config.sort.server-accelera: Whether to use close to instant sorting when in singleplayer or if Mouse Wheelie is installed on the server.
mousewheelie.config.sort.shift-sort.desc: Sets the sort mode for sorting whilst pressing shift.
mousewheelie.config.tool-picking.always-: Always refills into the currently selected hotbar slot, even if free hotbar slots are available.
mousewheelie.config.tool-picking.descrip:
Configure when and how picking the correct tool for the currently faced block will work.
By default tool picking will be triggered when middle clicking, that may be changed through the Vanilla Controls menu.
mousewheelie.config.tool-picking.hold-bl: Middle-click while holding the same block
Pick correct tool when middle clicking (rebindable) whilst holding the same block as faced.
mousewheelie.config.tool-picking.hold-to: Pick correct tool when middle clicking (rebindable) whilst holding a tool.
mousewheelie.config.tool-picking.pick-fr:
Allows picking tools from the whole inventory.
If disabled picking will only happen from the hotbar.
mousewheelie.features.reduced-by-server: The server has disabled certain Mouse Wheelie features:
mousewheelie.gui.config-screen-unavailab: Opening the config screen with the keybinding is currently unavailable.
Please use Mod Menu to edit the config or use an external application to edit the config directly.
